query: SELECT direcao, COUNT(*) as total, MAX(createdAt) as ultimo FROM arquivos GROUP BY direcao ORDER BY total DESC
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT direcao, COUNT(*) as total, MAX(createdAt) as ultimo FROM arquivos GROUP BY direcao ORDER BY total DESC
